user_system_path: Owner-directed CONNECTOR-FRESHNESS seam (#507): fix two real connector sync defects proven against live tkg_signals. (1) OneDrive produced zero signals ever — microsoft-sync syncFiles queried /me/drive/root/search(q='')?$filter=... which Graph rejects (empty search query + unsupported $filter on search), so it always 400'd and silently fell back to /recent, which only sees recently-accessed files in the tiny incremental window and never backfills history; Files.Read IS granted, so re-consent does not fix it. (2) google_calendar goes perpetually stale — google-sync syncCalendar set timeMax=now so it only ever fetched already-past events and never upcoming meetings, unlike the Microsoft +14d lookahead. Backend-only fix in lib/sync/**; the connector-health stale-source email (the original symptom) is left as-is because it was reporting truthfully. Repointed from the paused LANDING seam (#500); repoint back to #500 then Scout #494 after merge.
allowed_files_raw: CONNECTOR-FRESHNESS seam #507: the fix lives in lib/sync/** (microsoft-sync.ts syncFiles -> drive delta enumeration with /recent fallback; google-sync.ts syncCalendar -> +14d lookahead). Coupled sync unit tests under lib/sync/__tests__/** (within lib/sync/**) and tests/** if needed. Control-plane + Bible governance edits permitted.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard, Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No new connectors and no auto-send. The connector-health email path is intentionally untouched.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npx vitest run lib/sync/__tests__/microsoft-sync.test.ts lib/sync/__tests__/google-sync.test.ts
required_browser_proof: Live OneDrive + Google Calendar backfill requires a real Microsoft Graph / Google API cron run against production OAuth tokens (GET /api/cron/sync-microsoft and /api/cron/sync-google with CRON_SECRET), then re-querying tkg_signals for non-zero onedrive and fresh google_calendar rows. This is owner-gated runtime truth (no paid/prod mutation from the harness). Absent that run the live freshness claim is BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT.
acceptance_condition: lib/sync syncFiles enumerates OneDrive via the drive delta endpoint (with /recent fallback) and syncCalendar uses a +14d lookahead; gate:continuity + typecheck green; sync unit tests green; no dashboard/Stripe/Scout/schema/secret changes; the connector-health email path unchanged. Live non-zero onedrive + fresh google_calendar signals are owner-gated runtime proof.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/dashboard, app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
mail sync (outlook/gmail) and its timestamp-advance behavior unchanged
stop_condition: Fix lands as a draft PR on claude/new-session-0r1iqf targeting #507; gate:continuity + typecheck + sync unit tests green. Live OneDrive/Calendar backfill is owner-gated (BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT). After merge, repoint control plane back to the paused LANDING seam #500, then the Scout seam #494.
next_command: Owner: review + merge the #507 sync fix, then run the sync crons (or wait for the schedule) and confirm non-zero onedrive + fresh google_calendar in tkg_signals. After merge, repoint source truth back from #507 to #500, then #494.
